name: Piped Baked Potato and Bouquet of Fresh Vegetables Fntv
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the russet potato with the skin on.
2. Scoop out the center and mix it with the previously boiled potatoes.
3. Mash the mixture with butter, chives, and sour cream, seasoning to taste.
4. Pipe the mashed filling back into the potato skin.
5. Sprinkle paprika on top and bake at 500°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Lightly sauté vegetables in butter until desired tenderness.
Serving Suggestion:
Serve with a Stuffed Baked Potato and a Bouquet of Fresh Vegetables (recipe follows). Recommended vegetables include broccoli, asparagus, mushrooms, baby carrots, and cherry tomatoes. Brush steaks lightly with clarified butter before serving and season to taste with salt, garlic salt, celery salt, black pepper, and any other preferred seasonings.
